quran.verse: "And among His Signs is that He created for you mates from among yourselves, that you may find tranquility in them, and He has put love and mercy between you. Surely in that are Signs for those who reflect."

thankyou.message: We are deeply grateful for your presence, blessings, and gifts. We pray that our marriage will be filled with goodness and blessings from Allah.
thankyou.tagline: See You On Our Big Day!
